Keywords: bottom sheet modal sheet overlay panel
Platform Variants: iOS: UISheetPresentationController; Android: ModalBottomSheet (MD3)
Purpose: Present secondary content without losing context (filters actions details media)
Do: Use grab handle to hint draggability; support swipe-to-dismiss; provide scrim for modal variant
Don't: Block full screen unnecessarily; use for primary navigation; open bottom sheets from bottom sheets (stack)
Animation Spec: Expand: 300ms ease-out spring; Dismiss: 250ms ease-in
Accessibility: Announced as 'popup'; focus moves to first element; background covered by scrim prevents interaction; swipe-down dismisses for VoiceOver

Keywords: fab floating action button primary create add action
Platform Variants: iOS: No native — use custom; Android: FAB / Extended FAB / Small FAB (MD3)
Purpose: Trigger primary screen action (create compose record add)
Do: Single FAB per screen; position bottom-right; use extended FAB with label for clarity
Don't: Multiple FABs on one screen; use for navigation (use tab bar); hide behind other content
Animation Spec: Scale 0.95 on press 80ms; appear with scale+fade 300ms
Accessibility: Required: accessibilityLabel describing action not just icon; tooltip on long press; 'Button' role implied

Keywords: snackbar toast notification brief message undo action
Platform Variants: iOS: Custom (no native Snackbar); Android: Snackbar (MD3)
Purpose: Brief feedback message after action; optional single action (Undo); auto-dismissing
Do: Auto-dismiss after 4s; one action max (Undo); position above nav bar; avoid stacking
Don't: Block user; show errors (use Alert/Dialog); show while keyboard is open (obscures content)
Animation Spec: Appear: 250ms slide up; Dismiss: 200ms fade out
Accessibility: Announced via accessibility live region; action button fully accessible; avoid timing-out before user reads (extend on focus)

Keywords: alert dialog popup confirm destructive warning
Platform Variants: iOS: UIAlertController (.alert style); Android: AlertDialog / BasicDialog (MD3)
Purpose: Confirm destructive actions; present critical decisions requiring immediate response
Do: Keep to 2 actions (max 3); title required; positive action = rightmost on iOS
Don't: Auto-dismiss; present non-critical info (use snackbar); use for long content (use full sheet)
Animation Spec: Pop-in: scale 0.95→1 + fade 200ms; Dismiss: 150ms fade
Accessibility: Focus moves to dialog; background blocked; title read on appear; button labels must be self-explanatory; Escape/back = cancel

Keywords: action sheet bottom options ios share menu
Platform Variants: iOS: UIAlertController (.actionSheet); Android: ModalBottomSheet with list (MD3)
Purpose: Present 3-8 contextual options; share menu; 3-dot menu expansion
Do: Include Cancel option; group related actions; destructive action in red at bottom (iOS)
Don't: Show more than 8 options (use full sheet list); replace modal navigation; show on first launch
Animation Spec: Slide up 250ms ease-out; Cancel tap: slide down 200ms
Accessibility: Each option fully accessible; sheet announced as 'action sheet'; Cancel always first focus OR bottom most

Keywords: skeleton loading shimmer placeholder loading state
Platform Variants: iOS: Custom; Android: Shimmer / Lottie / Custom Compose
Purpose: Indicate content is loading while preserving layout
Do: Match final content dimensions; animate shimmer 1-1.5s loop; display after 200ms delay
Don't: Show for <200ms loads (just show content); display after content loads; use for unknown content shapes
Animation Spec: Shimmer animation 1200ms linear infinite horizontal gradient
Accessibility: Announce 'Loading' to screen readers; transition to 'loaded' announced; avoid jarring content shift after load

Keywords: pull to refresh indicator spinner loading refresh
Platform Variants: iOS: UIRefreshControl; Android: SwipeRefreshLayout / PullRefresh Compose
Purpose: Signal that a manual data refresh is in progress
Do: Use standard system controls; provide haptic on trigger; return to top after refresh
Don't: Trigger refresh automatically on scroll (user expectation violation); use for initial load (show skeleton)
Animation Spec: Expand on pull proportional to pull distance; spinner after threshold cross
Accessibility: Add manual refresh button for accessibility; announce 'refreshing' and 'refreshed' via live region

Keywords: search bar input filter search field search
Platform Variants: iOS: UISearchBar / UISearchController; Android: SearchBar + SearchView (MD3)
Purpose: Filter content or trigger search flow
Do: Activate on tap; show cancel/clear button; preserve query on back
Don't: Auto-submit on every keystroke (debounce 300ms); hide below fold; force full-screen overlay for simple filter
Animation Spec: Expand from icon: width 250ms ease-out; suggestions appear 150ms fade
Accessibility: Label: 'Search field'; hint text read as placeholder; clear button labeled 'Clear search'; results count announced

Keywords: navigation bar top bar app bar title back
Platform Variants: iOS: UINavigationBar; Android: TopAppBar (MD3)
Purpose: Display current screen title and actions (back edit share search)
Do: Large title on root level; standard title on drill-down; 2-3 actions max right side
Don't: Overload with many buttons (3+ right); use for primary content; custom heights that break system behavior
Animation Spec: Cross-dissolve title transition on push 300ms; large-to-standard title collapse on scroll
Accessibility: Title announced on screen push; back button accessible; buttons described with labels not just icons

Keywords: context menu long press preview peek actions
Platform Variants: iOS: UIContextMenuInteraction; Android: PopupMenu / ContextMenu
Purpose: Provide quick access to item-level actions without navigating away
Do: Include preview when meaningful; max 5-7 items; organize with separators
Don't: Show for primary actions (use buttons); auto-open on load; duplicate main screen actions unnecessarily
Animation Spec: Preview scale pop 0.98→1 250ms spring; menu fade-in 150ms
Accessibility: 'Actions' available via VoiceOver double-tap-hold or swipe up for actions; each action labeled; dismiss on Escape/back

Keywords: badge notification count dot unread indicator
Platform Variants: iOS: UITabBarItem.badgeValue; Android: MaterialBadge (MD3); NotificationBadge
Purpose: Indicate unread count or new activity without interrupting user
Do: Show meaningful count; cap at 99+; red for urgent neutral for info
Don't: Animate badge on every update (distracting); badge decorative information; show exact count over 999
Animation Spec: Badge appear: scale 0 → 1 bounce 200ms spring; count change: brief pulse 150ms
Accessibility: Badge value announced with context: '3 unread, Inbox'; dot badge: 'New content in [tab name]'

Keywords: progress bar loading indicator progress determinate indeterminate
Platform Variants: iOS: UIProgressView / UIActivityIndicatorView; Android: LinearProgressIndicator / CircularProgressIndicator (MD3)
Purpose: Communicate loading or task progress status
Do: Determinate (known duration); indeterminate (unknown); show after 500ms threshold
Don't: Show for instant operations; use spinner for indefinite but short waits; block UI unnecessarily
Animation Spec: Determinate: animate value change 300ms ease-in-out; Indeterminate: infinite 1200ms cycle loop
Accessibility: Progress value announced as percentage; label describes task: 'Uploading photo, 60%'; complete state announced

Keywords: tab bar item icon label badge indicator
Platform Variants: iOS: UITabBarItem; Android: NavigationBarItem (MD3)
Purpose: Represent a top-level section in the tab bar navigation
Do: Icon + label both visible; 44pt touch target; 2-5 items
Don't: Text-only tabs (iOS HIG); icon-only without label (Android MD3 recommends labels); more than 5 items
Animation Spec: Selected state: color shift 100ms ease; badge bounce 200ms spring on appear
Accessibility: Label + icon announced: 'Home, tab 1 of 5'; selected state: 'Home, selected'; badge: '3 unread, Home, tab 1 of 5'

Keywords: chip filter tag label pill selectable removable
Platform Variants: iOS: Custom pill; Android: AssistChip FilterChip InputChip SuggestionChip (MD3)
Purpose: Compact elements for filters input tags or suggestions
Do: Wrap chips to multiple rows if needed; min 32pt/40dp height; group related chips
Don't: Chips for navigation (use tabs); primary actions (use button); make too small to tap
Animation Spec: Selected: background color fill 100ms; deselect: 100ms reverse
Accessibility: Chip type/role announced; selected state announced; removable chips: X button labeled 'Remove [chip name]'

Keywords: empty state no content zero state first use
Platform Variants: iOS: Custom; Android: Custom (no standard component)
Purpose: Communicate when a list or screen has no content and guide next action
Do: Illustrate the empty scenario; include primary CTA to fill the gap; friendly copy
Don't: Show empty state during loading; use generic 'No results' without guidance; sad/error message for expected-empty
Animation Spec: Fade in after data confirmed empty 300ms; illustration entrance from bottom 250ms ease-out
Accessibility: Announce 'No items' with context; CTA button accessible; avoid emoji-only illustration (no text alternative)

Keywords: toast android toast brief message auto-dismiss
Platform Variants: iOS: Custom; Android: Toast (legacy) / Snackbar (preferred MD3)
Purpose: Very brief non-actionable system message; background app events; legacy pattern (prefer Snackbar)
Do: Use Snackbar instead; auto-dismiss 2-3.5s short; app-wide usage only
Don't: Use Toast for important messages (use Snackbar with action); show from Activity after activity finishes
Animation Spec: Appear: fade in 150ms; Dismiss: fade out 150ms
Accessibility: Announced via accessibility live region; no action possible — use Snackbar if action needed; prefer Snackbar for all new code

Keywords: segmented control segment toggle switch view mode
Platform Variants: iOS: UISegmentedControl; Android: SegmentedButton (MD3)
Purpose: Toggle between 2-5 mutually exclusive view modes or options
Do: Use for immediate effect (not form submission); 2-4 options ideal; equal width segments
Don't: Navigation between screens (use tabs); more than 5 segments; use for binary on/off (use Switch)
Animation Spec: Selected segment: 200ms fill transition; pressed: 50ms scale 0.97
Accessibility: 'Segmented control' role; selected value announced; options count: '3 options, Photos selected'

Keywords: switch toggle on off setting preference binary
Platform Variants: iOS: UISwitch; Android: Switch (MD3)
Purpose: Enable or disable a single setting or feature
Do: Label left or above toggle; show immediate effect; confirm destructive toggles
Don't: Multi-toggle without context; use as confirmation substitute (use modal); no label
Animation Spec: Thumb slide: 250ms spring ease; track color: 150ms ease
Accessibility: State announced on change: 'Dark mode
column10: on' / 'off'; label read before state; role: 'switch'

Keywords: image picker photo gallery camera media select
Platform Variants: iOS: PHPickerViewController / UIImagePickerController; Android: Photo Picker (Android 13+); ActivityResultApi
Purpose: Let user select photo or video from library or capture new
Do: Use system picker for privacy; support multiple selection if needed; preview before upload
Don't: Build custom gallery (permissions implications); access all photos without PHPickerViewController (iOS)
Haptic Feedback: Use PHPicker (no permission needed for selection); check Info.plist keys for camera
Animation Spec: Use Photo Picker API (no storage permission on Android 13+); camera needs CAMERA permission
Accessibility: System pickers are accessible; custom pickers need full accessibility implementation: image labels grid nav

Keywords: pull-down menu dropdown button menu ios
Platform Variants: iOS: UIMenu on UIButton (iOS 14+); Android: DropdownMenu (MD3)
Purpose: Show list of options anchored to a button
Do: Show 3-8 options; include icons for quick scanning; use separator between groups
Don't: Too many options (use full sheet); primary single action (just use button); on Android prefer DropdownMenu MD3
Animation Spec: Menu appear: 150ms scale from anchor + fade; Dismiss: 100ms fade out
Accessibility: Button announces 'shows menu' as hint; menu items announced; checkmarks read as 'selected'; Escape/back dismisses
